title: Ngom
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ngom''' were creatures from the [[Yuuzhan'tar|original Yuuzhan'tar]] and later transplanted to the [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Vongformed Yuuzhan'tar]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They made bass-sounding noises, and had fleshy growths from their necks.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
